title: FakeGun
description: This is a relatively friendly firearms plugin, featuring realistic ballistics, a variety of weapons, and simple purity. It includes a recipe book.
body:
![FakeGun poster](https://s21.ax1x.com/2024/08/28/pAAFGWt.jpg)
# Truth test, refuse simulation.
## Realistic ballistic trajectory
The FakeGun ballistics detection uses solid collision detection instead of ray tracing. It fires a metal pellet as a bullet and continuously checks for surrounding solids, dealing damage accordingly. The bullet has realistic velocity and is visibly rendered rather than being represented by a straight line.
# Complete instructions,Simple recipes.
## User-friendly interface.
We have a recipe book system that immerses you in the gameplay, so you don't have to keep popping out to check tutorials. Simple recipes also allow new players to enjoy playing the plugin happily.
# Other items
## More fun
We have more than just FakeGun; we also have FakeTools, such as smoke grenades and rocket launchers, which might bring you a lot of fun.There are more items waiting for you to explore. The rocket launcher can create big explosions.
# Regarding plugins
## Requirements for plugins
- The server version should be as new as possible, preferably between 1.19.2 to 1.20.1.
- Supports Spigot and its forks for the server.
Main command: /fg
You can use this command to get your recipe book.
If you encounter any issues about the plugin, feel free to submit an issue or comment on Github or Gitee.
![FakeGun海报](https://s21.ax1x.com/2024/08/27/pAkfPER.jpg)
